steps.text:
```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Scrape Hacker News] --> B[Extract top 5 stories]
    B --> C[Output table]
```

I will now retrieve the top 5 stories from Hacker News.

formats.prompt: Extract the top 5 stories on the page. For each story, provide the title and the number of points. Give me exactly 5.

output.answer:

3. Artemis II is not safe to fly - 484 points
4. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry - 570 points
5. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments - 50 points
